dialogue_texts: Oh, My Majesty, thank you so...
Don't mention it, please. Consider it a royal stimulus package.
Besides, seeing you slumped over like that was ruining the scenery.
Your intervention knocked the curse out of me.
It was less of an intervention and more of a "forceful eviction."
The glohm had no permit to be loitering in your soul.
So, the conductor finally steps out of the pit.
I've been following the trail of your "stagnant notes" all the way here, Berenice.
You're useless now, Fusana. And so is that pathetic human shrine maiden there...
Please deal with her, My Majesty.
Time for me to finish both of you.
That's a bold word coming from someone whose magic smells like a dusty library.
You're charged with high treason against the kingdom.
The Federal Kingdom of Gensokyo is mine.
Big talk for a one-woman band!
You will be destroyed after you found a way to rid the glohm from her.
I hope you brought an encore, because my "royal decree" is about to hit you at high speed!
You will be destroyed, your remains will be used to build something new, and that soul will destroy all of Gensokyo.
